name: token-saviour
description: Route every coding task to the most token-efficient tool per layer: serena (code reads), rtk (command output), caveman (prose output), Ponytail (code output) — backed by a 9-tool benchmark.

interface.longDescription: Four token layers, one benchmark-picked tool each: serena for code reads, rtk for command output, caveman for prose output, Ponytail for generated code. Stacked: −70% measured.
defaultPrompt: Use token-saviour to plan the cheapest way to do this task.
Which token layer is this task stressing, and which tool should I use?
